networkApiTokens.comment: One identifier is Vite's modulepreload polyfill call, limited to hrefs from bundled same-origin modulepreload links. The other is the plain word 'fetch' inside the bundled offline Alice book text, not executable code; G2 Reader and the Even Hub SDK add no fetch call.
This is the Even Hub SDK's protobuf field-name string for input eventSource, not construction or use of the browser EventSource network API.
